# Eloquentix Blog

> Engineering blog of Eloquentix Inc., a software and AI engineering consultancy founded in 2002. Essays and field notes on AI engineering, agentic systems, architecture, and 25 years of building production software.

The blog covers AI engineering in practice (agentic systems, AI-generated code review, prompt engineering, multi-model workflows), software architecture at scale (virtual power plants, real-time systems), and observations on how AI is changing how software gets built.

## About Eloquentix
Eloquentix is a software and AI engineering consultancy founded in 2002. 25 senior engineers. 82 clients across energy, fintech, SaaS, and media. Led by CEO Radu Rosu. Main site: https://www.eloquentix.com

## Key Pages
- Blog index: https://blog.eloquentix.com/
- RSS feed: https://blog.eloquentix.com/feed.xml
- Eloquent Lens (AI codebase audit): https://www.eloquentix.com/lens.html
- Kardia (AI constitution): https://kardia.eloquentix.com
